steps.title: Find the plural subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank is "its ruminations on fourteenth-century Persian life." The head noun is "ruminations," which is plural, so the verb must also be plural.

steps.title: Reject singular verbs
steps.content: B, C, and D are singular verb forms, so they do not agree with the plural subject "ruminations." A plural present-tense verb agrees with the subject and fits the sentence. The answer is A.
